# iFAST Roadside Assistance & Mobile Tires

> 24/7 emergency roadside assistance and mobile tire service across the Greater Toronto Area (GTA). Fast ~30-minute average ETA. Damage-free, licensed, and insured. Upfront pricing and a real ETA are given before dispatch.

## About

iFAST Roadside Assistance is a mobile roadside and automotive service operating around the clock across the Greater Toronto Area — from Scarborough and Durham Region through Toronto, York, and Peel. Technicians come to the customer's location (roadside, home, or workplace); no shop visit is required for most services.

- Name: iFAST Roadside Assistance & Mobile Tires
- Phone: +1 437-215-3468
- Email: help@ifastroadside.ca
- Website: https://www.ifastroadside.ca
- Hours: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week (including holidays)
- Rating: 4.9 stars on Google
- Service model: Mobile / service-area business (we come to you)

## Services

- Mobile Mechanic — on-site diagnostics and repair at your home, workplace, or roadside.
- Mobile Tire Service — flat tire repair (patch-and-plug), spare tire change, and new/used tire installation, mounted and balanced on-site.
- Battery Jump Start — anti-surge boost packs that protect vehicle electronics; on-site battery diagnostics and replacement.
- Car Lockout — damage-free entry with non-marring professional tools.
- Fuel Delivery — premium, regular, or diesel delivered to your vehicle.
- Emergency Towing — modern flatbeds for AWD and luxury vehicles without drivetrain damage.

## Service area

Greater Toronto Area, including: Toronto, Scarborough, North York, Etobicoke, Markham, Richmond Hill, Vaughan, Mississauga, Brampton, Pickering, Ajax, Whitby, and Oshawa.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://www.ifastroadside.ca/
- Blog (guides and pricing): https://www.ifastroadside.ca/blog
- CAA vs. independent roadside comparison: https://www.ifastroadside.ca/blog/caa-vs-independent-roadside-assistance-ontario
- Mobile mechanic pricing guide: https://www.ifastroadside.ca/blog/mobile-mechanic-cost-ontario-pricing-guide

## Contact

To request service, call +1 437-215-3468. Callers receive an upfront price and an estimated arrival time before a technician is dispatched.
